milestones.name: Login core
milestones.outcome: Users can log in with email + password
exit_criteria: Login endpoint returns 200 + JWT session token on valid credentials
Login endpoint returns 401 on invalid credentials
11th login attempt within 60s from the same IP returns 429 with Retry-After header

milestones.name: Password recovery
milestones.outcome: Users can reset a forgotten password without contacting support
exit_criteria: Recovery email delivered within 60s of request
Reset link is single-use with 15-min TTL

stories.name: Implement /v2/auth/login endpoint
stories.description: Build the new login endpoint that validates credentials and returns a session token.
tasks: Implement credential validation against user_credentials table
Return JWT session token on success
acceptance_criteria: POST /v2/auth/login with valid creds returns 200 + JWT

stories.name: Add rate limiting to login endpoint
stories.description: Enforce 10 requests/min per IP using existing rate-limit middleware.
tasks: Return 429 with Retry-After header on overflow
acceptance_criteria: 11th request within 60s from same IP returns 429

stories.name: Build recovery email flow
stories.description: Send password-reset email with a single-use, 15-min-TTL link.
tasks: Send email via existing transactional provider
acceptance_criteria: Recovery email arrives within 60s of POST /v2/auth/recover
Reset link succeeds once, then returns 410 on re-use

stories.name: Implement password reset endpoint
stories.description: Accept the signed token + new password; update credentials store.
tasks: Hash new password and update user_credentials
acceptance_criteria: POST /v2/auth/reset with valid token + new password returns 200 and old sessions are invalidated
